notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Trevor Larnach
notableEvents.detail: Top 3 · Trevor Larnach grounds into a force out, first baseman Christian Walker to shortstop Nick Allen. Tristan Gray out at 2nd. Trevor Larnach advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Nick Allen.
